scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentmesh/protocol && npm run build -w @agentmesh/sdk && npm run build -w @agentmesh/mcp-server && npm run build -w agentmesh-sync && prisma generate && npm run build -w web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @agentmesh/protocol && npm run build -w @agentmesh/sdk && npm run build -w @agentmesh/mcp-server && npm run build -w agentmesh-sync && prisma generate && concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w realtime"
